name: @artale/pi-focus
description: Focus timer with productivity metrics for Pi. Tracks tok/min during focus vs break. Data-driven productivity.
readme:
# pi-focus
Pomodoro focus timer for Pi. Stay productive.
## Install
```bash
pi install npm:@artale/pi-focus
```
## Commands
```
/focus start [min]  — start focus (default 25min)
/focus break        — take a break (5min)
/focus stop         — stop timer
/focus              — show status
```
